query: SELECT fecha, COUNT(*)::BIGINT as "total_reservas!", COALESCE(SUM(num_personas), 0)::BIGINT as "total_personas!" FROM reservas WHERE user_id = $1 AND fecha >= make_date($2, $3, 1) AND fecha < (make_date($2, $3, 1) + INTERVAL '1 month') AND estado NOT IN ('cancelada') GROUP BY fecha ORDER BY fecha
